mapper.sql: os.id, os.order_id, os.song_id, os.song_name, os.singer_name, os.sort_order, os.status, os.play_time, os.finish_time, os.create_time, os.update_time, os.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , s.duration, s.file_path FROM t_order_song os LEFT JOIN t_song s ON os.song_id = s.id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE os.order_id = #{orderId} AND os.deleted = 0 AND os.status IN (2, 3) ORDER BY os.finish_time DESC, os.play_time DESC
SELECT , s.duration, s.file_path FROM t_order_song os LEFT JOIN t_song s ON os.song_id = s.id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE os.id = #{orderSongId} AND os.deleted = 0
